evidence: standards/enterprise/performance-resilience.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A missing budget requires the exact uncovered journey, risk, temporary evidence, owner, expiry, and budget-establishment plan; Canon never supplies a universal numeric substitute.
statement: Every applicable performance budget MUST identify its user journey, environment, measurement method, owner, baseline, and product-reviewed threshold; Canon MUST NOT prescribe one universal numeric value.
